name: test_comparing_across_types_yields_null_except_numbers[<=-1-3.14]

statusDetails.message:
AssertionError: Expected results but query failed: Query execution failed: {code: Neo.ClientError.Statement.ExecutionFailed} {message: Statement execution failed: cypher: undefined variable 'i'}
Cypher: MATCH p = (n)-[r]->()
WITH [n, r, p, '', 1, 3.14, true, null, [], {}] AS types
UNWIND range(0, size(types) - 1) AS i
UNWIND range(0, size(types) - 1) AS j
WITH types[i] AS lhs, types[j] AS rhs
WHERE i <> j
WITH lhs, rhs, lhs <= rhs AS result
WHERE result
RETURN lhs, rhs
